name: Threat Intelligence Platform
description: Aggregates, correlates, and analyzes cyber threat data from multiple sources including allied nations, dark web monitoring, and honeypots. Provides actionable intelligence to anticipate and prevent attacks.

specialAbilities.name: Predictive Threat Analysis
specialAbilities.description: AI-powered analysis predicts likely attack vectors and campaigns before they materialize, enabling preemptive defense.

specialAbilities.name: Allied Intelligence Sharing
specialAbilities.description: Real-time threat data exchange with allied nations creates a collective defense network with broader visibility.
